allow: PowerShell(cd D:\\Het\\demo2; Start-Process python -ArgumentList "app.py" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/page5" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Page5 HTTP" $r.StatusCode } catch { Write-Host "Error:" $_ })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/data/process_report" -UseBasicParsing; $body = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Success:" $body.success "  JC count:" $body.data.Count)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/page5" -UseBasicParsing; $html = $r.Content; $checks = @\("tab-pr","pr-container","pr-search","exportPRExcel","Process Report","પ્રક્રિયા અહેવાલ"\); foreach \($c in $checks\) { if \($html -match [regex]::Escape\($c\)\) { Write-Host "FOUND: $c" } else { Write-Host "MISSING: $c" } })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 15;$i++\){ try{ $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/data/job_cards?search=&page=1&per_page=50" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $ok=$true; break }catch{ Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if\($ok\){ $r.Content } else { "NOT_UP"; Get-Content "D:\\Het\\demo2\\_flasklog.txt" -Tail 30 })
